name: Q3_Revenue_Forecast.xlsx
content:
FINANCIAL FORECAST - Q3 2026

Target Revenue: $12.5M
Projected Actual Revenue: $14.2M
Net Beat: +$1.7M

Notes from CFO:
The beat is primarily driven by the enterprise tier adoption scaling faster than modeled. We are keeping these numbers strictly confidential until the board meeting on Oct 15.

name: Board_Minutes_Q3.docx
content:
NOVA FINANCE INC. - PRE-BOARD SYNCHRONIZATION NOTES
Date: Oct 08, 2026

Agenda Items:

1. Funding Status: The Series C round closed successfully. $25M raised at a $180M post-money valuation. This information is restricted from public PR until Nov 1.

2. M&A Activity: The acquisition of DataShield Inc. is proceeding to final signatures. Purchase price is agreed at $8M. This will bolster our internal security offerings.

3. Leadership Changes: The CISO role remains open with an allocated budget of $350K. Search firm has been engaged.
